systems.system_notes: NCB distal femur plating platform within the Zimmer Biomet trauma portfolio for distal femoral and periprosthetic fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation and targeting workflow for the NCB distal femur system.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe the distal femur plate family used within the NCB system.
Official technique materials describe polyaxial locking screw fixation used with the NCB distal femur construct.
Official technique materials describe the dedicated targeting guide and instrument workflow for the NCB distal femur system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official Zimmer Biomet sources confirm the NCB distal femur plate family and instrumentation, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper product-matrix or sterile implant listing pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
